_comment: BlueMagpie LocDiT CFM performance baseline, recorded 2026-07-04 before optimization work. Machine: AMD Radeon Graphics iGPU (RADV GFX1151, UMA), CPU threads as listed. Model: models/bluemagpie/bluemagpie.gguf (lm.* weights F16, 1697 MB total, lm.locdit.* 424 MB). Params: timesteps=10 (n_real=9 after zero-init skip), cfg=2.0, patch_size=4, latent_dim=64 => 160 ms of 48 kHz audio per AR step.

cfm_only_codec_bluemagpie_cfm_eval._comment: e2e fixture (mu,cond,z), 6 steps x repeats, warm. Per-call = one AR step's full CFM: 9 Euler x 2 CFG = 18 LocDiT estimator passes (12 layers, seq T=11).

full_step_generate._comment: codec_lm_step_generate via ctypes (tslm_adapter+FSQ+RALM kv step+LocDiT CFM+stop+LocEnc), 24 steps, random hidden, stop ignored. Graph is rebuilt EVERY step (cache key includes kv_pos; get_or_build also always re-runs build_fn).

realtime_factor._comment: RTF > 1 means slower than realtime; CFM alone is ~3.5x.
